reasoning: HARS encodes the cytosolic histidyl‑tRNA synthetase that charges tRNA^His. CRISPRi‑mediated knockdown of HARS reduces histidine‑tRNA charging, creating an amino‑acid‑deficiency‑like stress. This activates the GCN2‑eIF2α‑ATF4 integrated stress response. ATF4 together with CHOP can induce transcription of pro‑apoptotic and mitophagy genes, among which Bnip3 is a well‑known downstream target of ATF4/CHOP and also of HIF‑1α that is up‑regulated during cellular stress. Consequently, loss of HARS is expected to increase Bnip3 mRNA levels as the cell engages stress‑responsive pathways.
